payload.topic: Here is my rough draft: 'The city planted more trees and solved heat risk.' Give me feedback on whether my evidence use matches the source.
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, I will stay in feedback mode on your draft so you can revise it in your own words.

Your evidence use does not fully match the source provided. The passage indicates that increased tree canopy coverage was due to various factors including municipal grants, volunteer groups, and regulations for replanting after street repairs. It also notes that while trees helped reduce

encryption.note: Encryption at rest is not yet implemented in this service revision. This record is plaintext but remains locally stored and inspectable.
